login_hint: Enter your credentials to access the roster management app.
name: Name
import_staff_hint: Format: skip header, column A = staff name, B = role, C = email.
preferred_shifts_multi: Preferred Shifts (hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple)
auto_schedule_rule: Rule: fills each shift's required headcount using active staff, prioritizes preferred shifts for that date, skips leave/unavailable entries, then balances by least assignments.
confirm_roster_prompt: Are you sure you want to confirm this roster?
discard_draft_prompt: Are you sure you want to discard this draft? This cannot be undone.
no_roster_version_week: No roster version for this week yet.
roster_draft_notice: This roster is a draft and has not been confirmed.
payroll_note_confirmed_only: Payroll is calculated based on confirmed roster only.
wage_missing_hint: Hourly wage is empty. Treated as 0.00
no_staff_found_for_filter: No staff found for the selected filter.
import_headers_hint: Required headers depend on dataset. Keep date format as YYYY-MM-DD.
export_static_data_hint: Infrequent exports that do not require a date range.
export_roster_availability_hint: Date range applies to both Roster and Availability export.
only_confirmed_rosters_exported: Only confirmed rosters are exported by default.
msg_hourly_wage_non_negative: Hourly wage must be a non-negative number.
msg_choose_csv_file: Choose a CSV file to import.
msg_csv_staff_header_required: CSV must include a header row and at least one staff row.
msg_staff_import_finished: Staff import finished: {added} rows added, {skipped} rows skipped.
msg_shift_required_fields: Name, start time, and end time are required.
msg_availability_required_fields: Staff, start date, and end date are required.
msg_end_date_on_or_after_start: End date must be on or after start date.
msg_shift_pref_required_fields: Staff, start date, and end date are required for shift preferences.
msg_shift_pref_end_date_on_or_after_star: Preference end date must be on or after start date.
msg_select_preferred_shift: Select at least one preferred shift.
msg_confirmed_read_only: Confirmed versions are read-only. Switch to a draft version to edit.
msg_staff_unavailable_on_date: Staff member is unavailable on this date.
msg_shift_overlap: Shift overlaps with an existing assignment for this staff on this date.
msg_assignment_duplicate: This staff member already has this shift on this date.
msg_auto_schedule_duplicate: Auto-schedule failed due duplicate roster assignments for this week.
msg_auto_schedule_requirements: Need at least one active staff and one shift template before auto-scheduling.
msg_auto_schedule_completed: Auto-schedule completed for week of {week_start}: added {added} assignments, {unfilled} slots unfilled.
msg_invalid_roster_export_version_type: Invalid version type for roster export.
msg_csv_no_data_rows: CSV file has no data rows.
msg_import_finished: Import finished: {added} rows added, {skipped} rows skipped.
msg_import_failed_reference_or_duplicate: Import failed because rows reference missing records or duplicate unique fields.
